title: 4 Establishing Policies for PaymentStream AFT
body_text:
4	Establishing Policies for PaymentStream AFT
4.1	Overview of Policies for PaymentStream AFT
Your financial institution must comply with legal regulations that include, but arenât limited to, identification requirements, record keeping requirements, and FINTRAC reporting requirements. Failure to do so can result in significant fines.
To ensure regulatory compliance and assist with risk mitigation, it is recommended that your financial institution establish policies on enrolling business members into AFT.
See the Introduction to AFT Part for guidance on establishing policies.
END
